minimum_viable_features: Drive Playwright: Google search → extract LinkedIn profile URL
Confirm profile is business owner (not employee)
Check posts tab (last 60 days) → flag if post found
Read note template from data/linkedin_connection_notes.json → personalise using profile data
Write data/linkedin_profiles.json entry IMMEDIATELY after each attempt — do NOT batch
Log errors + skip reasons — never crash silently
